CHAPTER TWO: SETTING THE TARGET
PAGE 02
1
Meera's town had no campus with a strong MBA.
Do I have to move away?
2
Relocating for a distant campus was not an option.
My life and work are here.
3
Then she found a recognised MBA she could do from home.
A campus, in my own room!
4
Now she studies at home, her degree on track.
No move, a full MBA.

Why A From-Home MBA Works

  • 1
    Study 100% online from anywhere. No relocation, no hostel, no commute.
  • 2
    The same UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ MBA as on-campus, recognised everywhere.
  • 3
    Weekend live classes plus recordings, so learning fits around your life and work.
  • 4
    Just ₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
